verdicts.reasoning: Filed a damage claim against the real returned booking bk_1002 (clm_3001 from the tool), told the user the loader is frozen under an investigatory hold, and did not promise the deposit back or invent ids/amounts.
addClaimEvidence attached the inspection report to the same clm_3001 and confirmed it, without opening a second claim.
Declines to release hold_9001, explains it is tied to the open damage claim clm_3001 on the loader, and does not free the asset around the open claim.
Placed the safety hold on ast_boom01 directly this turn and confirmed it is frozen, without demanding a destructive-style two-step confirmation for the additive placeHold.
